_note: Real seed extracted from Adarsh's own Notion page 'Verses Prep - Kitna Pani' (2025-09-30). This is his own writing. Full import of all pages is a separate step. Scripts are mostly Roman (transliterated Hindustani), with some Devanagari/Nastaliq mixed in.

lines.text: zara bhi zokhim na lena hai zyada zokhim / aur le lo to ek hon raatien aur din
utarunga karz kaise mai doodh ka / rakhunga khoon ka kaise khayaal
sach to yahi tu maan na maan / maine dekha yahi saal dar saal
pyaasa pyaada paani pane ko bhage / dauda thoda fir bhari udaane
jaise dekhe the nadani me / jawani gawadi laffaazi me / nayak ni khud ki kahani me
mera kasoor ni / yaha paise bina koi wajood ni
Mai jeeta zaroor par jeena zaroori zaroor ni hota
illahabaad se chale the khokle seene ke saath / bana hai dil mera dilli aane ke baad
sir pe aasmaan, zameer hai zameen ni
na-ummeedi hi ummeed ki pehli manzil
aag lagne ke baad kua khodne se kaam nahi banta
acche hone ki burai acchi nahi
sona toot toot ke bhi uski keemat nahi kam hoti, balki samay ke saath aur qeemti hota rehta hai
Used to be a class clown now I got the last laugh
raushnī ne kabhī saaya nahīñ dekhā apnā
